Project Halcyon

Project codename: Halcyon

Owner: founder. Status: closed beta. Target launch: 2026-06-30.

  • Goal: ship multi-modal copilot with profile intelligence + live coaching.
  • Non-goals: enterprise SSO, on-prem deployment (deferred to FY27).
  • Success metric: 80% of pilot users issue a coaching-accept within first session.
